name: Tuggowar
short_description: Tuggowar is the big-brain deckbuilding duel. Engage in tense combat on a solarpunk frontier. Assemble your deck turn by turn, discover powerful card combos, disrupt the enemy strategy, and pilot your well-oiled war machine to victory!
detailed_description:
Experience the essence of deckbuilding. Engage in tense 10-minute battles on a level playing field. Figure out a fun build from a unique set of cards and carefully evolve your deck into a well-oiled war machine. Don’t copy decks, build on-the-fly and let your creativity shine. Every match is a new mind game! Beat the player, not the meta.

In this skill game you have a fair shot at the top spot, no matter the size of your collection. Climb the ranks fighting with weapons of equal strength. There is no pay-to-win.

Hone your skill in single-player missions that inspire your creativity.

Explore the many expansion packs Tuggowar has to offer, discover new cards, abilities, extreme combos, crazy interactions and counter-plays.

Expansion packs each feature 5 replayable missions with objectives of varying difficulty. These objectives help you find some of the more advances strategies. Some involve fixed steps while others are more puzzling.

Exploit powerful card combos and commanding strategies. Analyze, think deep, experience glorious lightbulb moments, discover unknown synergies, test, adapt and outplay to pull off truly epic wins!

Join the ranks of veterans who keep coming back for more, even after hundreds of hours. Just one... more... game...

Features

Innovative mechanics

• Interactive map instead of a life total

• Unique draw system

• Intricate hidden information dynamics

• Disrupt to counter key card combos

Made for PvP

• Ranked & casual modes

• PvP leaderboard

• Play a friend

• Mirrored shop mode

• Relaxed, normal and blitz game speeds

Chill in PvE

• Campaign missions

• Specialized AI bots (easy, normal, hard, unfair)

• Challenge runs: 7 win mini-tournaments

• Pause mid-game & resume later

Ever-growing card pool

• 50 base set cards

• Frequent release of new expansion packs

• New cards, new mechanics and new missions with each expansion

Medal system

• Influence the card pool used in a match

• Play with your favorite cards more often

• Collect medals and create your twist on the game

Progression

• Rank up from bronze to diamond - and beyond

• Collectable avatars & player titles

Analyze and Show Off

• Hyperlink replay sharing & spectator invites

• Observe live high-ranked matches

• Weekly show matches - get your spectacular wins featured!
